subcodes.first_line: O most truthful servant of the Abhá Beauty! Thy letter was received, and [we learned] of the ascension of the luminous leaf, the handmaiden of God, thy mother [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده اصدق جمال ابهی مکتوب شما واصل و از ارتحال ورقه نوراء امة الله والده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @parents and children; youth; families, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
